name: Airfocus Product Prioritization API
what_it_does: Modular product management platform with REST API for managing product roadmaps, prioritizing features with scoring frameworks, tracking OKRs, and collecting user feedback — offering flexibility to compose custom product management workflows.
use_cases: Creating and updating product items (features, bugs, initiatives) programmatically via API
Querying prioritization scores and roadmap data for executive reporting agents
Syncing Jira and GitHub issues with airfocus roadmap via API integration
Updating OKR progress from external data sources automatically
Building custom prioritization workflows that score items based on external data
not_for: Simple task management without product strategy needs (use Jira or Linear)
Teams needing free product management tooling (airfocus is paid)
Engineering workflow management focused on sprint execution
best_when: A product team needs flexible, modular product management with custom prioritization frameworks, roadmap views, and API access for integration with engineering tools.
avoid_when: You primarily need engineering sprint management or free/open-source product tooling.

auth.notes: OAuth2 with scopes for workspace access. Personal access tokens available for agent use. Bearer token authentication. Workspace-scoped — separate tokens per workspace. Scopes control read/write per resource type.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential from $19/editor/month; Advanced from $59; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Per-editor pricing — viewers free. Modular pricing adds modules for OKRs, customer feedback, etc. Strong for product-led organizations. European company with GDPR focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers items, workspaces, views, and integrations. OAuth2 with scopes for proper permission control. Webhook support for item changes. API documentation organized by resource type.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Item creation creates new items — no built-in deduplication. Update operations idempotent for same values. Read operations always idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: Modular product — available features depend on workspace module configuration
Workspace ID required in most API calls — agents must discover workspace context
OAuth2 scopes control access — ensure token has correct scopes for operations
Custom fields (airfocus calls them 'fields') require field IDs — not human names

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. OAuth2 with scopes. SOC2 certified. GDPR compliant with EU data residency. European company with strong privacy focus. Personal access tokens for service accounts.
